'''Slar-dan ti Gardi''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].

==History==
Gardi was a slaver who worked in the [[Ison Trade Corridor/Legends|Ison Corridor]]. He managed to stay out of trouble by bribing the local officials. After the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] took over law enforcement after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Gardi was imprisoned for attempting to bribe [[Dasha Fanron]]. After escaping custody, he fled to [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] space and partnered with [[Borun Call]] to continue trading slaves.<ref name="AJ8" />

He once captured [[Krotorra]] and [[Lamorrack]], two [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] representatives of the New Republic and sold them to the [[Vax Mining Group]]. He was then able to capture [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|New Republic Special Forces]] sergeant [[Tauran Nartal]] on [[Werncin 3]], who had come looking for the missing representatives, and subsequently sold him into slavery as well.<ref name="AJ8" />
